non_negotiable_rules.rule: Every routed page renders inside AppShell
non_negotiable_rules.violation: Page implements its own nav shell (custom <nav>, sidebar, bottom bar)
non_negotiable_rules.fix: Remove custom nav. Page returns PageHeader + PageBody content only.
non_negotiable_rules.principle: UI Architecture — Global Navigation & Layout Shell

non_negotiable_rules.rule: Two layout modes: Handheld (phone + tablet) and Desktop
non_negotiable_rules.violation: Tablet-specific layout variant created separately from handheld
non_negotiable_rules.fix: Tablets use handheld rules. No md: breakpoint exceptions for tablets.

non_negotiable_rules.rule: navigation.config.ts is the only place nav items are defined
non_negotiable_rules.violation: Nav item added inside a component, page, or feature file

non_negotiable_rules.rule: All domain state derived from server responses
non_negotiable_rules.violation: Client infers domain state from localStorage, component state, or URL params
non_negotiable_rules.fix: Fetch from server endpoint, derive UI behaviour from response

non_negotiable_rules.rule: Feature folders compose shared primitives, not re-implement them
non_negotiable_rules.violation: Feature creates its own Card, Button, or layout component
Arbitrary values [13px], inline styles, or feature-local CSS files
non_negotiable_rules.fix: Use Tailwind utility classes. Use shared tokens for colours.

non_negotiable_rules.rule: All interactive elements are keyboard accessible
non_negotiable_rules.violation: onClick without onKeyDown, or div used as button without role/tabIndex
non_negotiable_rules.fix: Add role=button, tabIndex=0, onKeyDown handler for Enter/Space

non_negotiable_rules.rule: Focus states must be visible on all interactive elements
non_negotiable_rules.violation: outline: none without replacement focus indicator
non_negotiable_rules.fix: Use focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 or equivalent visible indicator

non_negotiable_rules.violation: Small icon buttons or links below 44px in either dimension
non_negotiable_rules.fix: Add min-h-[44px] min-w-[44px] or equivalent padding

non_negotiable_rules.rule: Layout decisions derive from shared breakpoints only
non_negotiable_rules.violation: window.innerWidth checks, custom media queries in feature CSS
non_negotiable_rules.fix: Use Tailwind md: breakpoint (defined in tailwind.config.ts)

colour_conventions.note: Check existing components for accent colour — do not introduce new accent colours

retry_rules.idempotency: retries must not create duplicate domain entities — backend must be idempotent
